comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Arrakis (2-knob). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 6-knob desktop-preview manifest. Sub-octave depth, sweep rate, drive, and tone are baked in arrakis.c.
gid_comment: 0x01 = Dynamics category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DYN_. All custom effects grouped under Dynamics.

params.name: Detune
params.comment: params[5]. Beat spread between the two detuned voices.

audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
